issue: Backup registration timed out during provisioning.
root_cause: Backup service endpoint was unreachable from the target network.
fix: Validate network path to the backup controller, then rerun backup enablement.
follow_up: Add a precheck for backup service connectivity before provisioning.

issue: Health checks failed after platform configuration.
root_cause: Monitoring agents were not deployed with the expected configuration package.
fix: Redeploy the monitoring agent bundle and rerun service validation.
follow_up: Version-lock the monitoring artifact in the generated configuration.

issue: Infrastructure provisioning failed due to missing capacity.
root_cause: Requested node count exceeded the available quota.
fix: Reduce requested cluster size or request additional quota before retrying.
follow_up: Add an explicit quota validation precheck.

issue: Rollback could not restore the previous configuration.
root_cause: The last known-good configuration artifact was missing from storage.
fix: Recover the artifact from backup and re-run the rollback flow.
follow_up: Enforce artifact retention before production changes.

issue: DR failover validation failed because DNS cutover did not complete.
root_cause: DNS records were cached longer than the recovery plan assumed.
fix: Flush resolver caches where possible and extend the failover verification window.
follow_up: Capture DNS TTL and propagation time in the DR plan.

issue: Compliance audit step failed because encryption was disabled on one service.
root_cause: Configuration template did not include encryption defaults for all components.
fix: Patch the config template and rerun the compliance validation step.
follow_up: Add policy checks during config generation.
